title: Localparams in interfaces derived from parameters on the interface can be incorrectly computed

features.name: interface localparam derived from interface parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameter used to compute a localparam value within the same interface
features.snippet: interface SimpleIntf #(parameter int symbolsPerBeat = 16); localparam int symbolsPerBeatDivBy2 = symbolsPerBeat / 2; endinterface

features.name: multiple interface instances with different parameter values
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of the same interface type instantiated with different parameter values

features.name: interface localparam accessed via submodule connection
features.description: Code should include a submodule that receives an interface and accesses a derived localparam member from it
features.snippet: module Core(SimpleIntf intf); localparam int extracted = intf.symbolsPerBeatDivBy2; endmodule
